title: myTax 2017 Working holiday maker net income
description: How to complete the working holiday section of your return using myTax.
keywords: working holiday maker, working holiday maker income, working holiday, working holiday income, myTax, e-tax, online tax return, etax

content_blocks.text: Complete this section if, at any time from 1 January 2017 to 30 June 2017, you:

items: were on a 417 or 462 working holiday visa, and
earned or derived income during this period.

content_blocks.text: Different tax rates apply to the income you earned:
For more information, see Working holiday maker net income .

items: Enter the total amount of working holiday maker gross income you earned at any time from 1 January to 30 June 2017, while you were on a 417 or 462 visa. This includes salary or wages income showing at Payment summaries with type H .
Enter the total amount of deductions that relate to earning your working holiday maker income. MyTax will work out your Working holiday maker net income .

content_text:
Complete this section if, at any time from 1 January 2017 to 30 June 2017, you:
- were on a 417 or 462 working holiday visa, and
- earned or derived income during this period.
Different tax rates apply to the income you earned:
- up to 31 December 2016
- from 1 January 2017.
For more information, see Working holiday maker net income .
## Completing this section
- Enter the total amount of working holiday maker gross income you earned at any time from 1 January to 30 June 2017, while you were on a 417 or 462 visa. This includes salary or wages income showing at Payment summaries with type H .
- Enter the total amount of deductions that relate to earning your working holiday maker income. MyTax will work out your Working holiday maker net income .
- Select Save and continue .
